chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA 1st Cr. Bail Appln. No.D-138 of 2025 PRESENT: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, Mr. Justice Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Applicant: Pawan Kumar, through Mr. Aftab Ahmed Channa, Advocate. Respondent: The State, through Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General. Date of hearing: 24.02.2026. Date of Decision: 24.02.2026. Crime No.347/2025, PS A-Section, Kandhkot, u/s 9(i)-B, CNS Sindh Act 2024, Amendment Act, 2025. O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J.- Applicant Pawan Kumar seeks post-arrest bail in the aforesaid crime after the same has been denied by the Special Judge CNS/Sessions Judge, Kashmore at Kandhkot, by order dated 11.12.2025. 2. As per the FIR, a police party led by SIP Rukan Din Choliyani of A-Section Police Station, Kandhkot, spotted the applicant near New Sabzi Mandi, Kandhkot and recovered a black shopper from his possession, which contained 550 grams charas. 3. Heard learned counsel and perused the record. 2
